summary: GLS Sync Histórico and Tracking URL testing complete. 11/12 backend tests passed (1 skipped). All frontend UI tests passed. Fixed critical bug: tracking_url was using codplaza_dst instead of cp_destinatario. Sync histórico card in /crm/ajustes/gls working correctly with all data-testid elements.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: routes.py line 343-347 was calling _tracking_url with codplaza_dst instead of cp_destinatario - now uses destinatario.cp
FIXED: envio_doc now saves cp_destinatario field for future tracking URL generation
POST /api/logistica/gls/sincronizar-ordenes returns {ok, preview, total_procesadas, sincronizadas, creadas, actualizadas, no_encontradas, con_error, resultados[], ejecutado_en}
Sync correctly requires master/admin role (403 for tecnico)
Sync writes audit_logs with source='admin_panel' and tool='_sync_gls_historico'
Mock preview generates deterministic codbarras/codexp from SHA1 hash of numero_autorizacion
NOENCONTRADO-* prefix in numero_autorizacion forces not_found status in mock
UI sync card has all required data-testids: card-sync-historico, input-sync-dias, sync-total-candidatas, btn-ejecutar-sync
Regression: /crm/logistica panel loads with 6 envíos (GLS + MRW)
Regression: /crm/agentes panel loads with 8 agents, all ACTIVO
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing demo orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCP_ENV=preview active. GLS tracking URL now uses cp_destinatario (CP del cliente destinatario) instead of codplaza_dst (plaza GLS). Sync histórico endpoint at POST /api/logistica/gls/sincronizar-ordenes works in preview mode with mock data. Candidatas endpoint at GET /api/logistica/gls/sincronizar-ordenes/candidatas?dias_atras=N. UI card in /crm/ajustes/gls tab GLS at bottom of page. Currently 0 candidatas in DB (all demo orders already have gls_envios). To test sync with real data, create orders with numero_autorizacion but without gls_envios array.

mocked_apis_list: GLS SOAP preview - generates deterministic codexp/codbarras from SHA1 hash
GLS GetExpCli mock - NOENCONTRADO-* prefix returns not_found

tests: Returns tracking_url with cp_destinatario from BD or fallback to cliente.cp
verified_features.status: SKIPPED (no GLS envios with codbarras to test)

bug_fix_applied.issue: tracking_url was using codplaza_dst (GLS plaza code) instead of cp_destinatario (customer postal code)
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed _tracking_url call to use destinatario.cp and added cp_destinatario field to envio_doc
